CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raymond Tuason, Esq., Atkinson & Associates, 415.350.4999, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

No argument held. The Court adopted the tentative ruling, PLAINTIFF MARTIN SCOTT'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Defendant Luxor Cab Company's Subpoenas is Granted. The request for sanctions is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. =302/JPT
